summary: Capsule correctly identifies DynamoDB ProvisionedThroughputExceededException as root cause and captures the full SQS consumer failure cascade, but wrongly labels unrelated auth-token-near-expiry warnings as trigger events rather than distractors.
improvements: Remove the two auth-token-near-expiry lines (lines 6 and 10) from evidence — they are a recurring unrelated distractor with no causal link to the DynamoDB throttling incident
Add the final recovery line 'backoff applied, polling paused 5s' (line 24) as a consequence so an engineer knows the consumer self-throttled rather than looping indefinitely
